title: Pointers
description: Master memory addresses, pointer syntax, dereferencing, and common memory management practices in AAA games.
learningObjectives: Explain what a memory address is
Avoid common memory pitfalls like nullptr dereferencing

sections.title: Introduction to Memory Addresses & Pointers
sections.content: Pointers are variables that store memory addresses of other variables instead of direct values. In game programming, pointers are crucial for passing huge game objects without copying them, dynamic allocation, and writing direct performance-oriented systems.

sections.title: Declaring and Dereferencing Pointers
sections.content:
Using the address-of operator `&` and the dereference operator `*`:

```cpp
int level = 42;
int* pLevel = &level; // Stores address of level

// Dereference to get value
int currentLevel = *pLevel; // Gets 42
```
